creator: Skinner, Joseph
Phillips, Richard, 1767-1840
description: From El Mercurio peruano "as it was carried on during the first sixteen months, commencing with January 1791, and from various authentic sources ... 'Present state of Peru' has been compiled"--Pref., p. viii
Printer's imprint at foot of t.p. verso: Printed by B. M'Millan, Bow-Street, Covent-Garden

The Peruvian territory -- Natural history -- Mineralogy -- Commerce -- The Peruvian capital -- Indian and other inhabitants of Peru - -Typography -- Miscellaneous subjects of literature and philosophy -- Appendix
Binding: mabled paper over boards; leather spine and corners;
subject: Indians of South America
Costume
title: The present state of Peru : comprising its geography, topography, natural history, mineralogy, commerce, the customs and manners of its inhabitants, the state of literature, philosophy, and the arts, the modern travels of the missionaries in the heretofore unexplored mountainous territories, &c. &c.
